name: Apple-Rhubarb Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Put chopped rhubarb and apple pie filling in a greased 13x9 inches baking pan.
2. Mix sugar and Jello according to package instructions; sprinkle over the rhubarb.
3. Sprinkle cake mix over that.
4. Sprinkle water over all.
5. Slice butter on top of the cake mix.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
7. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream. If you're lucky enough to have any left, serve cold.
